prompt: We are a mid-tier regional bank connecting to SWIFT via Alliance Access software running on our own servers on-premises. We have no HSMs and do not use a service bureau or cloud-hosted SWIFT. What is our SWIFT architecture type and which CSCF v2026 controls are mandatory for us versus advisory? Give us a complete list.
key_differentiators: With skill: Correctly identifies 2.4 as mandatory in v2026 and includes it in the mandatory 24-control list
Without skill: Omits 2.4 from mandatory list and hedges on its v2026 status
With skill: Definitively states 2.4 was promoted from Advisory to Mandatory in v2026
Without skill: Only says to 'verify in the current CSCF version' whether 2.4 is mandatory
